author: Aamod Bhatt
name: AR Self-Gen GPTQ + XSA-11 + BigramHash 3072x112
blurb: Strict legal single-pass causal submission with AR self-generated GPTQ calibration, XSA across all 11 layers, and BigramHash 3072x112. 3-seed mean val_bpb=1.11555015.
technique_summary: AR self-generated GPTQ calibration + XSA-11 + BigramHash 3072x112 + int6/lzma
legal_notes: Single-pass causal evaluation only; no two-pass/full-rescore, no tokenizer/dataset modifications, no TTT/SLOT/ngram scoring path
